comments.comment: Point and fugitive emissions rose along with chemical usage.
Recycling rates increased as a result of new process.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Methanol Usage generally followed production. Releases decreased by over 90%. Under 20% of methanol is associated with purge solvent use, compared to over 90% of methanol associated with purge solvent releases. Purge solvent usage and releases decreased because larger blocks of vehicles were painted the same color throughout the year.

Methanol Usage generally followed production. Paint related material usage reduction containing methanol through more efficient vehicle painting processes was the main reason for decrease of methanol in 2013.

Methanol Usage generally followed production. Paint related material usage reduction containing methanol through more efficient vehicle painting processes was the main reason for decrease of methanol in 2013.

IPA is a component of numerous vehicle paints. The amount of each paint varies from year-to-year, depending on demand for certain colors. As a result, usage of IPA was somewhat higher than the production index and releases generally followed the production trend.

IPA is a component of vehicle paints and varies based on colour. IPA generally follows the production index and releases generally followed the production trend, however based on changing customer demand for different colours IPA decreased in 2013 due to changing colour popularity.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: IPA is a component of vehicle paints and varies based on colour. IPA generally follows the production index and releases generally followed the production trend, however based on changing customer demand for different colours IPA decreased in 2013 due to changing colour popularity.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Sodium nitrite is a reactant and either adheres to the vehicle body or is completely reacted and used up in the processes; therefore, releases are 0. Sodium nitrite usage has increased due to greater requirements in the phosphating system.

comments.comment: Sulfuric acid usage decreased because this chemical is no longer used in the metal pre-treatment process. It is however, used at the on-site Wastewater Treatment Plant. Sulfuric acid is completely reacted and used up in the processes.

comments.comment: More virgin purge solvent was used in comparison to reclaimed purge solvent because of quality control issues with the reclaimed purge.  MIBK is present at a higher concentration in virgin purge than in reclaimed purge.
